general_inquiry.question:
Find the second order expansion of the following function around 2:
$\cos (3 x)$ Do not show work just give me the final answer!!!
general_inquiry.response:
The second order expansion of \(\cos(3x)\) around \(x = 2\) is given by:

\[
-\cos(6) - 3 \sin(6)(x - 2) - \frac{9}{2} \cos(6) (x - 2)^2
\]
